name: D/D/D Wave Oblivion King Caesar Ragnarok
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>怒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>濤</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>薙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カエサル・ラグナロク
desc:
2 "D/D/D" monsters
Once per turn, when an attack is declared involving this card: You can target 1 other "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card you control; return it to the hand, and if you do, equip 1 face-up monster your opponent controls to this card, except the battling monster. This card gains ATK equal to the combined original ATK of the monsters equipped to it by this effect.
